fields.acceptance_criteria: viewer-api-dioxus crate provides reusable Dioxus components matching viewer-api/frontend parity; ticket-viewer/dioxus-frontend runs as WASM app with full ticket read/write capabilities via ticket-api HTTP endpoints; ticket-http exposes write API for all ticket mutations
fields.title: Epic: Dioxus Viewer Platform — viewer-api-dioxus + ticket-viewer Dioxus frontend
